sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3581" key="a)krolute/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-λῠτέω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζώνην</foreign>, <sense id="n3581.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play with the ends</tr_> of a belt, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">as if untying it,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.252</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Iren.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
